title: Smoky Spanish-Style Chorizo Fried Rice
description: A spicy and savory twist on traditional Chinese fried rice, featuring smoky chorizo and caramelized onions.

ingredients.name: smoky chorizo
ingredients.notes: Spanish chorizo adds a deep, smoky flavor to this dish

ingredients.name: caramelized onions
ingredients.notes: slow-cook onions in a pan until they're dark and caramelized

ingredients.name: bowl
ingredients.notes: a large bowl to toss and serve the fried rice

ingredients.name: salt
ingredients.notes: season with salt to bring out flavors

ingredients.name: black pepper
ingredients.notes: freshly ground pepper adds a nice kick

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced chorizo and cook until browned, about 2-3 minutes. Remove from the pan and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil and scramble the beaten egg until cooked through. Remove from the pan and set aside with the chorizo.
Add the caramelized onions to the pan and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the cooked rice to the pan, breaking up any clumps with a spatula. Stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, until the rice is heated through and starting to brown.
Add the cooked chorizo and egg back into the pan, stirring to combine with the rice.
Add the soy sauce, sesame oil, salt, and black pepper to the pan, stirring to combine.
Transfer the fried rice to a large bowl and garnish with chopped scallions, if desired.
